body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Phase Language/Mantra bridge-v3 targeted acquisition.

**The neurobiology of altered states of consciousness induced by drumming and other rhythmic sound patterns.** — Annals of the New York Academy of Sciences (2025). PMID: 40668575. DOI: 10.1111/nyas.15403. Score: 33. Humans have long sought to alter their mental states through various cultural practices, with rhythmic sounds emerging as aprominent and enduring method. However, altered states of consciousness induced by rhythmic auditory stimulation have not been comprehensively addressed in academic research, and the associated cognitive and neural underpinnings remain enigmatic.
